Video.summary: This is a special Brave Nation lightweight championship edition of total Combat presents. In the blue corner is the challenger representing Egypt, Ahmed “The Butcher” Amir. Fighting out of the red corner the defending champion representing France Amin "Fierceness" Ayoub. This is one of the greatest title fights in Brave Nation history!
Video.title: ... BRAVE

Video.summary: Come on an icy adventure to a freeskiing competition in Switzerland. Meet an 84-year-old man that concerned the Antarctic Ice Marathon. Kayak down a glacial waterfall and set flight at the Ragnarok snowkiting competition in a snowy wonderland edition of Pure Outdoor.
Video.title: | A snowy wonderland
